meaning: n.口吃,结结巴巴v.口吃着说
examples: He spoke with a pronounced stutter.
He tended to stutter whenever he spoke to her, which tried her patience.
The little girl speaks with a little stutter.
Sure there are requisitions, but employers are holding back, waiting for the economy to stutter back to life.
We see an occasional stutter, but nothing that has a noticeably negative impact on the use of the device.
